response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and versatile software engineer with over 15 years in the field, demonstrating strong coding skills and initiative through personal projects and workshops. However, his resume presents him as a senior hands-on implementer rather than a director-level strategic leader. The experience lacks evidence of defining high-level AI product strategy, advising strategic partners, or influencing company-wide technical direction, all of which are core responsibilities for this Principal Engineer role.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (15+ years) across a wide range of technologies and platforms.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
Demonstrates leadership and entrepreneurial initiative through founding a project (GISCollective) and organizing technical workshops.
concerns: Experience does not reflect the director-level seniority and strategic scope required for the role.
Lacks demonstrated experience in defining long-term AI strategy for major products or platforms.
No clear history of advising strategic customers or partnering with senior product leadership on roadmap definition.
